settings.heading: Couch Delivery Sydney
settings.subheading: Careful couch and sofa pickup and delivery across Sydney, including Marketplace purchases and single-item moves.
settings.fallback_trust_text: Trusted by Sydney households and Marketplace buyers for careful couch handling.

settings.heading: Couch pickup and delivery, done the careful way
settings.body: Titan Express picks up couches and sofas from homes, shops and Facebook Marketplace sellers, then delivers them to houses, apartments and offices across Sydney. Whether it is a one-off single seat or a large corner modular suite, our trained team handles every piece with care.

settings.text: Compact and cosy, perfect for smaller living spaces.

settings.heading: Three-seater sofas
settings.text: Full-size comfort for families and open-plan homes.

settings.text: Flexible configurations that fit any corner.

settings.heading: Sofa beds
settings.text: Multi-functional pieces for guest rooms and studios.

settings.heading: Recliners
settings.text: Motorised and manual options for maximum relaxation.

settings.heading: Corner lounges
settings.text: Large statement pieces handled with precision.

settings.heading: Get a free quote
settings.text: Tell us about your couch, pickup and delivery locations, and we'll provide a fixed price.

settings.heading: Schedule your delivery
settings.text: Choose your preferred date and time window. We're flexible and can often accommodate same-day requests.

settings.heading: We handle the heavy lifting
settings.text: Our experienced team arrives with protective equipment, loads your couch safely, and delivers it to your door.

settings.heading: Years of experience
settings.text: Specialising in careful furniture moves since day one.

settings.heading: Facebook Marketplace experts

settings.heading: Sydney-wide coverage
settings.text: From the beaches to the mountains, we've got you covered.

settings.heading: Protective equipment

settings.heading: Professional team
settings.text: Trained, courteous and respectful of your home.

settings.heading: Recent couch deliveries
settings.intro_text: Here are some recent couch and sofa delivery jobs we've completed across Sydney.

settings.question: How much does couch delivery cost in Sydney?
settings.answer: Get a free, fixed-price quote tailored to your specific pickup and delivery locations. Prices vary based on distance, couch size, and access.

settings.question: Can you deliver from Facebook Marketplace?
settings.answer: Yes! We specialise in collecting items from Marketplace sellers across Sydney and delivering them to your home. Just provide the pickup and delivery addresses.

settings.question: How quickly can you deliver?
settings.answer: We often offer same-day delivery in Sydney. For peak periods, we typically schedule within 48 hours. Contact us for your preferred date and time.

settings.question: Is my couch protected during delivery?
settings.answer: Absolutely. Our team uses protective blankets, straps, and padding. We're trained to handle all couch types—from delicate fabrics to leather and suede.
